subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-21 in London
subcodes.first_line: Last night, there was a theatrical performance about the birth of Jesus Christ. It was truly skillful to the utmost
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیشب تشخیص ولادت حضرت مسیح بود فی الحقیقه در نهایت اتقان بود ولکن محل عبرت
subcodes.subjects: @literal interpretation, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @outward and inward meanings, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
